subject: Lord Dingwall from Disney/Pixar's Brave — an older wild-haired Scottish lord in tartan kilt gesturing aggressively with a shield, a smaller younger figure tumbling beside him
description: A tall, lean older man with wild white hair and a flamboyant mustache strides forward, one hand pointing accusingly outward and the other gripping a round wooden shield at his hip. He wears a green and dark red tartan kilt and an open-backed vest. To his side and below him, a much smaller younger figure — apparently his son — appears to be stumbling or being caught in the wake of the lord's forceful movement, looking startled. The background shows a moody sky with distant highland village lights. The older man's wide, wild-eyed expression and aggressive point make 'Bullheaded' obvious as a descriptor.
foreground: Wild-haired older lord in tartan kilt pointing aggressively, shield at hip, smaller son figure stumbling beside
background: Moody grey-blue highland sky with distant warm village lights
